## Checklist

- [ ] PR title uses Conventional Commit format, for example `fix(worker): reject stale fences`
- [ ] Tests run are listed above, or the reason they were not run is stated
- [ ] Docs are updated when behavior, commands, or public APIs change
- [ ] Migrations and persistence changes are called out explicitly
